# cc-maru-plugin

Maru's Claude Code extensions plugins containing custom skills and agents.

## Installation

Install from the following marketplace
- https://git.linecorp.com/nomura-yuta/cc-plugin-marketplace
- https://ghe.corp.yahoo.co.jp:myamate/cc-plugin-marketplace

## Included Plugins

### initex
Generate optimal CLAUDE.md and .claude/rules/*.md files through interactive questioning, following research-backed best practices for LLM context engineering.

**Usage:** `/initex`

### prompt-simplifier
Simplifies and refines agent/skill prompts for clarity and conciseness while preserving all requirements.

**Usage:** Available as an agent through the Task tool

### fetch-review-comments
Fetch unresolved PR review comments with file paths and line numbers for easy discussion.

**Usage:** `/fetch-review-comments`
